children.title: desired vs actual lateral acceleration (closer means better conformance to plan)
desired vs actual lateral acceleration, road-roll factored out (closer means better conformance to plan)
controller feed-forward vs actuator output (closer means controller prediction is more accurate)
configured-initial vs online-learned steerRatio, set configured value to match learned
configured-initial vs online-learned tireStiffnessRatio, set configured value to match learned
live steering angle offsets for straight-ahead driving, large values here may indicate alignment problems
offline-calculated vs online-learned lateral accel scaling factor, accel obtained from 100% actuator output
learned lateral accel offset, vehicle-specific compensation to obtain true zero lateral accel
offline-calculated vs online-learned EPS friction factor, necessary to start moving the steering wheel
actuator lag learning state, 0 = learning, 1 = learned/applying, 2 = invalid
offline default vs online estimated steering actuator lag
online estimated steering actuator lag, standard deviation
rate-of-change limits on steering actuator (blue = original, green = rate-limited before CAN output)
controller feed-forward vs actuator output (closer means controller prediction is more accurate)
proportional, integral, and feed-forward terms (actuator output = sum of PIF terms)
road roll angle, from openpilot localizer
